texto: Jessie reached for 'Ten Bright Ideas to Light Up Your Sales'. It was on her bedside table, right next to 'Charlotte's Web'. Jessie's hand hovered. She looked longingly at Wilbur and Fern watching Charlotte hanging b a thread.But this was war, and she couldn't stop to read for fun.
explicacao: Citação de Jacqueline Davies sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Jessie reached for 'Ten Bright Ideas to Light Up Your Sales'. It was on her bedside table, right …” articula reflexao, reading, jessie em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
